Path of the Faithful.description: The dominant path within House Cawdor. Additional D6 rolled for each Leader or Champion on the battlefield during Faith dice generation.

articles.name: "And Contempt shall be My Armour!"
articles.description: Grants immunity to psychic powers within 6" radius; failure reduces Willpower by 1.

articles.name: "And Lo His Gaze did Illuminate them!"
articles.description: Attack through smoke, ignore darkness, add 1 to Initiative vs Flash weapons.

articles.name: "And the Word fell upon them, and they were Broken by it!"
articles.description: Forces Nerve tests on enemies within 9"; failure affects invoker instead.

articles.name: "And by Their Works shall They be known!"
articles.description: Enemy Psyker within 12" makes Leadership check; failure triggers Perils of the Warp.

articles.name: "And the Heart of the Heretic was easily cowed!"
articles.description: Enemy loses Ready marker; failure ends invoker's activation.

articles.name: "And those of Warped and Twisted Limb shall be Despised!"
articles.description: Allies within 6" re-roll failed hits against Brutes and fighters with mutations.

Path of the Fanatic.description: The frenzy of faith the Redemption is known for. Additional D6 rolled for each fighter Engaged with enemies during Faith dice generation.

articles.name: "And Lo, I did spread my Wings and the God-Emperor carried me aloft!"
articles.description: Add 3D6" to leap distances; reduce jump-down distance by D6+2".

articles.name: "And by our Pain shall He Judge our worth!"
articles.description: Improve Toughness by 3; suffer Flesh Wound (applied later if threshold passed).

articles.name: "And without thought He Smote Them Down!"
articles.description: Free Charge action; -2 modifier to hits for the round (or battle if failed).

articles.name: "And His Feet carried him into the fray!"
articles.description: Free Move action; suffer an immediate Flesh Wound regardless.

articles.name: "And He stood Defiant upon the mountain!"
articles.description: Prevent being Prone/Pinned by ranged attacks; cannot take cover.

articles.name: "And He Gave Unto Them the Emperor's Mercy!"
articles.description: Interrupt enemy's Coup De Grace to perform a free Fight action.

Path of the Doomed.description: Celebrates the death of all things. Faith dice generated on 4+ instead of 5+ when the Leader is Seriously Injured/Out of Action or the gang fails a Bottle test.

articles.name: "And the people Rose Up in their multitudes to aid Him!"
articles.description: Add D3 fighters to the battlefield; failure results in one gang fighter taken Captive.

articles.name: "And by the manner of his Death did the Emperor judge him!"
articles.description: Move, create Large Blast (5") centred on fighter dealing Str 3 hits; invoker goes Out of Action.

articles.name: "And in the Grace of the Emperor even Death was Defied!"
articles.description: Ignore Seriously Injured effects; can't go Out of Action until end of next activation.

articles.name: "And in His Light were they struck blind!"
articles.description: Fighters within 6" can only target/be targeted by ranged attacks within 3".

articles.name: "And a river of blood did Drown Them!"
articles.description: Enemy counts Out of Action gang members as friendly for Bottle tests.

articles.name: "And upon a Fortress of Bone shall my Strength be built!"
articles.description: Increase Strength and Toughness by number of Out of Action Gangers (max +3); failure reduces both by 1.

Path of the Redeemer.description: Purify the souls of the faithless. Additional D6 rolled for each enemy fighter Seriously Injured or taken Out of Action this round.

articles.name: "And each Blow shall be a Barb unto my enemy's flesh!"
articles.description: Enemy melee attackers must pass Willpower check or suffer a Flesh Wound.

articles.name: "And Flame shall Burn Away their sin!"
articles.description: Melee/Versatile weapons gain Blaze trait; failure applies Blaze condition to invoker.

articles.name: "And with Iron Teeth shall they be Devoured!"
articles.description: Re-roll failed Wound rolls with chain weapons.

articles.name: "And Agony brought the unbelievers Low!"
articles.description: Wounded enemies within 6" limited to single action; failure limits invoker to single action.

articles.name: "And in His Gaze were they Found Wanting!"
articles.description: Judge enemy within 9"; failed Willpower check prevents actions next activation.

articles.name: "And Death could not stay His Righteous Wrath!"
articles.description: If invoker goes Out of Action, one nearby enemy suffers Str 5 AP-1 D2 hit.

Path of the Prophet.description: Utter devotion to the word of the Prophet and the Great Pilgrimage. Roll additional D6s equal to your crew's numerical advantage during Faith dice generation.

articles.name: "Look not upon the Face of the Prophet, lest he Blind you with his Glory!"
articles.description: Fighters within 12" turn their vision arcs away from the invoker.

articles.name: "By his Word shall you be Redeemed and in his Name shall you Serve!"
articles.description: Engaged enemy that fails Willpower check becomes Insane.

articles.name: "Look to the Light of the Prophet!"
articles.description: Visibility rules are unaffected for all fighters within 12".

articles.name: "Look not to the counsel of False Masters!"
articles.description: Enemy fighters within 12" cannot benefit from Group Activations or Gang Hierarchy.

articles.name: "Let those who Fear, Fear Not, and those who Fear Not, Know Fear!"
articles.description: Broken fighters within 12" Rally; all others must make Nerve tests.

articles.name: "Empty are the Hands of the Faithless!"
articles.description: Enemy fighters count as Unarmed in close combat against the invoker.
